events.title: BLACK ROOM x HIDDEN RHYTHM SOCIETY presents DRAKK🇺🇸
events.fullTitle: BLACK ROOM x HIDDEN RHYTHM SOCIETY presents DRAKK🇺🇸
events.description:
Mark your calendars for November 23 as Miami’s most dynamic collectives, Black Room and Hidden Rhythm Society, unite to bring you an unforgettable night. We’re excited to announce the MIAMI debut of DRAKK, a rising techno talent known for his intense sets.

This event goes beyond music—it’s a celebration of unity, powered by two of Miami’s leading underground communities. Joining DRAKK, we’ll have incredible sets by up-and-coming talents DOMNROB, CÛLTÛS VÎS, and DUVI, who will take you on a journey through the night, embodying the essence of the underground.

Very LIMITED early bird and early arrival tickets are ON SALE NOW. Don’t miss out on this unique experience at a secret warehouse location! 🔒

Come have a drink with us as we celebrate this collaboration!

First beat at 11 PM.
Production by Miami Electro Waves.

NO RACISM, SEXCISM, HOMOPHOBIA, TRANSPHOBIA OR HATE OF ANY KIND.

events.description:
🔥 RAVERS! 🔥

Join us BAJO EL SOL for an unforgettable NEW YEAR’S WELCOMING CELEBRATION! ☀️🎉

🌴 We’re throwing a FREE beach rave featuring TWO STAGES of electrifying music, curated by:
🎧 @blackroom.us
🎧 @hiddenrhythmsociety
🎧 @clandestine.mia
🎧 @hyperperreo

🍔 Food & Vibes: Savor mouthwatering burgers and hotdogs fresh off the grill while losing yourself to the hypnotic beats of our talented DJs. 🎶

💖 This is our way of saying THANK YOU to our AMAZING COMMUNITY for your unwavering support. You’ve made everything possible, and we can’t wait to give you and your friends memories that will last a lifetime!

🎟️ FREE ENTRY with RSVP on Posh. (Donations are appreciated but never required!) 🖤

Let’s ring in the new year together with pure energy, great music, and unbeatable vibes.

💃 LET’S PARTY!!! 🕺


Parking in-park available for $10. Cash Only.

events.description:
Get ready for a night of unrelenting energy as Black Room, Corruption and Clandestine come together to deliver Miami's FIRST underground rave of 2025 presenting German DJ Tanja Miju.

This is no ordinary night. It's a journey into the deep, dark pulse of underground techno, where the kicks never stop, and the bass reverberates through your soul.

Tanja Miju will take you on a sonic adventure, blending driving rhythms and dark melodies that will have the dance floor moving like never before.

Joining her will be a stellar lineup of your favorite locals, Dadrev B2B Instinct, Domnrob, and Quetamine.

With a secret location, cutting-edge production, and a crowd that thrives on the thrill of the underground, this is one rave you do not want to miss.

events.title: SHAY DE CASTRO🇲🇽 Presented by BLACK ROOM x DRP SZN
events.fullTitle: SHAY DE CASTRO🇲🇽 Presented by BLACK ROOM x DRP SZN
events.description:
Get ready for an electrifying night of peak driving techno as Black Room & Drp Szn present Shay de Castro

Shay De Castro has built a reputation for delivering explosive and immersive sets that push boundaries. With a signature sound blending driving basslines, atmospheric textures, and relentless beats, Shay has captivated dancefloors worldwide. Known for her unique approach to techno and her ability to read a crowd, her headlining performance will be nothing short of spectacular, transporting you to a world of dark, hypnotic grooves.

Spice Crime a rising star who has made waves in the local techno scene. As a woman in the industry, Spice Crime brings a raw, unapologetic energy that will set the tone for the night. Expect deep, moody, and textured techno with driving rhythms and intricate soundscapes, making for an unforgettable performance that will keep you moving from the first beat to the last.

Drp Szn will be setting the stage with his signature dark and immersive techno sound. Known for his seamless mixes and high-energy sets, Drp Szn will be taking you on a sonic journey through the depths of underground techno, ensuring that the night builds with intensity and never lets go.

Don't miss your chance to experience a night of cutting-edge techno with some of the best talents in the scene. This is going to be a night to remember—come prepared to lose yourself in the music and dance until the early hours.

With a unique secret location, state-of-the-art production, and a crowd that lives for the excitement of the underground, this is an unforgettable night that's not to be missed!

📅 Join us February 8th for this special collab event.

events.title: VARIANCE RAVE: NIOTECH🇩🇪 Presented by BLACK ROOM
events.fullTitle: VARIANCE RAVE: NIOTECH🇩🇪 Presented by BLACK ROOM
events.description:
Prepare yourself for an electrifying night of hard bouncy techno as Black Room presents _VARIANCE_ featuring NIOTECH! This time, we're delivering a unique rave experience, a _rave with two rooms of techno_ on the same night! That’s right—two rooms of nonstop techno in one location. Expect a stellar lineup, a boiler room setup, captivating light show production, a massive new warehouse venue, and, of course, the signature vibes that only a Black Room rave can bring.

Two rooms, two distinct vibes,

⬛ Black Room (Boiler room): Dive into hard-hitting sounds from

@feelingsoicky

@dadrev_ B2B @6mania6

and @proletar.ro, all setting the stage for our headliner of the night, @niotech.

🟥 Red Room: Experience a dynamic lineup featuring

@jakeanthony.music,

@c0l.11 B2B kujo.wav

@milaagamaa B2B @s.d.r.v.

**About Niotech:**

Niotech is a techno artist whose musical roots trace back to his early days playing the piano. Originally from Karlsruhe, he is now based in Berlin, where he runs his successful label, _Whalien_. The label serves as a creative platform for his distinct vision of techno, showcasing his innovative approach to the genre.

As a prolific producer, Niotech consistently pushes the boundaries of techno with his dynamic releases. With tracks featured on renowned labels and growing support from some of the biggest names in the DJ scene, Niotech is undoubtedly a rising force to watch.

📅 Join us February 21st for this special event.

+18 TO RAVE

+21 TO DRINK

🎟️ Tickets available now via link in bio!

First beat at 11 PM.

Production by Miami Electro Waves

🚨NO RACISM, SEXCISM, HOMOPHOBIA, TRANSPHOBIA OR HATE OF ANY KIND.🚨

events.title: VARIANCE RAVE: ZEUZ🇩🇪 Presented by BLACK ROOM x DIONYSUS x HRS
events.fullTitle: VARIANCE RAVE: ZEUZ🇩🇪 Presented by BLACK ROOM x DIONYSUS x HRS
events.description:
Get ready for a night of relentless hard techno as Black Room x Dionysus and HRS present _VARIANCE_ featuring Zeuz!

This time, we’re taking the rave experience to the next level with _two rooms of nonstop techno_ in a single night. That’s right—Proper Techno and Hard Techno all under one roof! Expect a killer lineup, a boiler room setup, stunning light show production, a massive warehouse venue, and the unmatched vibes you’ve come to expect from a Black Room rave.

**About Zeuz:**

In a remarkably short time, Zeuz has risen to become one of the most sought-after DJs in his genre. Hailing from Cologne, he’s made a thunderous impact on the underground scene, thrilling listeners with his unique sound and captivating performances.

Zeuz’s journey into music began at a young age, influenced by legends like Westbam and Marusha. Initially exploring tech- and deep house, he eventually discovered his love for dark, underground techno—a sound that now defines his style.

Today, his music is characterized by dark, driving basslines, distinctive synthesizers, and hypnotic vocals. Zeuz has performed at some of Germany’s most iconic clubs, including Airport Würzburg, Bootshaus, and Essigfabrik in Cologne, all while staying true to his roots. Get ready to experience the intensity and artistry that Zeuz brings to every set—you won’t want to miss it!

📅 Join us March 7th for this special collab event.

+18 TO RAVE

+21 TO DRINK

🎟️ Tickets available now via link in bio!

First beat at 11 PM.

Production by Miami Electro Waves

events.fullTitle: VARIANCE RAVE: LOKIER🇲🇽 Presented by BLACK ROOM
events.description:
Miami, are you ready for an elevated techno experience? 🔥 Welcome to Black Room! Headlining this unforgettable night is Lokier, the Berlin-based DJ/producer making her Miami debut! Joining her is a carefully curated lineup of incredible artists, AN CHEN, DOMNROB, FRANKY DE REY.

**ABOUT LOKIER:**

Mexican-born, Berlin-based DJ, producer and owner of the LightStrike label,

present on the world's stages since 2009. Known for her constantly evolving

sound, love of melody and playful mixing of genres from hard techno and industrial

to groove uplifting upbeat rave with a touch of trance, banging beats, weirdo synth

and power electronics.

Get ready for the next chapter in Miami’s rave scene.

events.title: VARIANCE RAVE: KX CHR🇫🇷 X BRIELA VENENO🇨🇴 Presented by BLACK ROOM x TECHNO BROOKLYN x SOUND UNION
events.fullTitle: VARIANCE RAVE: KX CHR🇫🇷 X BRIELA VENENO🇨🇴 Presented by BLACK ROOM x TECHNO BROOKLYN x SOUND UNION
events.description:
📅 June 6th, 2025 | 11PM – Late\
📍 Secret Warehouse Location (Miami)

**One night. Three collectives. A new chapter for Black Room.**

We’re teaming up for the first time ever with two of the strongest techno forces in the U.S.—**Techno Brooklyn** and **Sound Union**—to bring you the **sixth edition of VARIANCE** and one of our **biggest events to date**.

This is our **first double-headliner night**—and both artists are making their **USA debut**:

🇫🇷 **KX CHR** – After lighting up festivals and iconic clubs like REX Club and NEXUS, the DJ/Producer lands in Miami for the first time with his fast-paced, rave-tested sound.

🇨🇴 **BRIELA VENENO** – One of Colombia’s fastest rising techno names, with appearances at EDC Mexico and across Latin America. Raw, powerful, and impossible to ignore.

Two rooms. One warehouse. Pure underground.

🖤 **BLACK ROOM** (Hosted by Techno Brooklyn)\
Hard. Fast. Unforgiving.\
With: KX CHR, BRIELA VENENO, DOMNROB, ICKY B2B KRYZ, NECCNOH.

❤️ **RED ROOM** (Hosted by Sound Union)\
Groovy. Hypnotic. Deep.\
With: ALEJO, BE-EAZY, EZRA LAW, ROBYN SIN LOVE.

Expect booming sound, strobe-lit chaos, and a room full of real heads.\
**Location drops day of. Don’t sleep.**

📅 Join us June 06th for this special collab event.

Welcome to SOMA  and its first ever modality: RED ROOM XL 🟥

Yes, it’s happening. And yes… the deck is open 😈

events.title: COLOSSEUM RAVE: DRAKK🇺🇸 F2F HELLBOUND🇺🇸
events.description:
📅 **August 8th, 2025 | 11PM – Close**\
📍 2060 NW 1st Ave, Miami, FL 33127

**The arena expands. COLOSSEUM II arrives — now with three chambers of chaos.**\
Black Room unleashes the second edition of its signature **F2F (Face to Face)** format — where DJs battle head-to-head from opposing consoles, reacting and clashing live in front of the crowd.

This time, we go bigger. For the first time ever, **COLOSSEUM features three active rooms**, each curated by a distinct collective, each built for different energies.

⚔️ **Headlining the F2F Battle: NIOTECH F2F IGDA**\
Two Berlin-based weapons step into the arena. Expect a furious clash of energy, distortion, and style as they go face to face in the Black Room — no filler, no compromise.

🖤 **BLACK ROOM — F2F BATTLE ARENA** \
Hard. Fast. Unforgiving.

- ANTIMATTER F2F DADREV

- DOMNROB (DOM F2F ROB)

- NIOTECH **F2F** IGDA

❤️ **RED ROOM — HARDGROOVE ZONE** (Hosted by DO NOT FACE THE DJ)\
Funky, looping, and percussive all night long.

- Full lineup TBA

🌀 **FRAGMENTED ROOM — RITUAL ENERGY** (Hosted by LAVACITY)\
Tribal. Miami. Perreo. Tekno.\
A hybrid room designed for movement and sweat.

- Full lineup TBA

But the night doesn’t end there...

🔥 **RED ROOM XL — AFTER HOURS**\
A second location opens at **3AM** and runs **until late** — no stages, no limits, just raw after-hours pressure for the ones who don’t stop.

Three rooms. One warzone. Then, the aftershock.\
Warehouse energy. Stripped-back production. A lineup that prioritizes connection over ego.\
**Location drops day of. Don’t sleep.**

+18\
First beat at 11PM.

🚨 NO RACISM, SEXISM, HOMOPHOBIA, TRANSPHOBIA OR HATE OF ANY KIND. 🚨\
⚠️ Due to the nature of the event, we do not offer refunds.\
📧 DM @[blackroom.us](http://blackroom.us) or contact [info@blackroom.live](mailto:info@blackroom.live) for more info.

#COLOSSEUMII #MiamiTechno #F2FBattle #ThreeRoomTakeover #BlackRoom #DoNotFaceTheDJ #LavacityVibes #RedRoomXL #AfterHoursEnergy

events.title: COLOSSEUM RAVE: NIOTECH🇩🇪 F2F IGDA🇩🇪
events.description:
**BLACK ROOM PRESENTS: COLOSSEUM II**\
**THREE ROOMS. ONE WARZONE. THEN, THE AFTERSHOCK.**

📅 August 8th, 2025 | 11PM – Close\
📍 Wynwood Warehouse Location – 2060 NW 1st Ave, Miami, FL 33127

The arena expands. COLOSSEUM II returns—this time with triple the chaos.\
Black Room unleashes the second edition of its signature **F2F (Face to Face)** format — where DJs go head-to-head from opposing consoles in a live, reactive, high-pressure duel.

For the first time ever, COLOSSEUM features **three active rooms**, each curated by a unique collective and designed for a different flavor of sonic warfare.

---

**🖤 BLACK ROOM — F2F BATTLE ARENA**\
Hard. Fast. Unforgiving. The booth becomes the frontline in our most aggressive room, built for distortion, intensity, and nonstop impact.

- DADREV F2F S!CK

- DOM F2F ROB (DOMNROB)

- NIOTECH F2F IGDA

⚔️ *Headlining the F2F Battle:* NIOTECH vs. IGDA — Two Berlin-based weapons go head-to-head in a high-octane duel of energy and style. No filler, no compromise.

---

**❤️ RED ROOM — TRIPPY GROOVE ZONE**\
Bouncy. Groovy. Trippy. Rhythmic pulses and rolling energy all night long.

- DIMELOJUJU B2B FLAGGEN

- HIDETHEBODY 

- LUVM1 H8M1

- TRIXXX THE TRIP

---

**🌀 FRAGMENTED ROOM — HARDGROOVE ZONE**\
Funky. Looping. Percussive. A floor that swings from grit to hypnosis.

- DIANA FRANCO

- KEVIN BITHELL

- MADISON KAY

- MR. PROPER

---

**🔥 LAVAROOM XL — AFTER HOURS**\
When the main warehouse shuts down, we keep going.\
A nearby second location opens at 3AM and runs until late — no stages, no limits, just raw after-hours pressure for those who don’t stop.

Warehouse energy. Stripped-back production. A lineup that prioritizes connection over ego.\
Location drops day of. Don’t sleep.

+18\
First beat at 11PM

🚫 NO racism, sexism, homophobia, transphobia, or hate of any kind.\
⚠️ Due to the nature of the event, we do not offer refunds.\

events.title: FRAGMENTED
events.description:
📅 **Friday, August 29** | 10PM – Close\
📍 **Casa Nube Wynwood**

**FRAGMENTED RETURNS** 🌀\
This edition dives deep into **bouncy, groovy, and hard trance!** Built for the ones who move until the lights come up.

This time, we’re bringing you **FRESH KID** — one of Colombia’s fastest-rising names in underground dance music.\
Based in Bogotá, Fresh Kid is the founder of **Ross Records** and **Bounce Dealers**, co-owner of **Core Beats**, and a master selector whose sets blend **Bounce, UK Garage, Hard Trance, Hard Groove, Hard Techno, and Schranz** into a sonic trip that builds to pure euphoria. He’s played some of the most respected clubs across Colombia and beyond—from Bogotá’s Kaputt to Amsterdam’s Sissis Expo-resto—and will soon hit the **BAUM Festival 2025** stage. Now, Miami gets its turn.

Supporting him are two local favorites who never fail to shake the floor:\
⚡ **PROLETAR** – relentless, high-energy selector with an ear for crowd control.\
⚡ **INSTINCT** – groovy and unpredictable, with sets that pull you in from the first kick.

This isn’t just another night—it’s **Fragmented**. Where the walls sweat, the floor moves, and the sound doesn’t let go.

📍CASA NUBE WYNWOOD\
+18 | No refunds | Secret location warehouse rave.

By purchasing a ticket and/or attending *Blood Feast*, you acknowledge and agree to the following:

```
1\. Immersive Blood Experience

•	Blood Rain: This event includes interactive blood-themed effects using non-toxic, theatrical-grade fake blood. Guests should expect direct exposure during designated “blood rain” moments.

•	Clothing & Footwear: Fake blood may permanently stain clothing, shoes, and personal items. Black Room is not responsible for any damage or loss to personal property. Please plan your outfit accordingly.

2\. No-Splash Zones

•	For guests who prefer not to be covered in blood, there will be clearly marked “No Splash” zones. Entering these zones ensures minimal to no exposure. Guests are responsible for remaining in these designated areas if they wish to avoid contact.

3\. Health & Safety

•	Fake blood is non-toxic and cosmetic-safe, but guests with allergies or sensitivities to dyes, theatrical products, or similar substances should exercise caution.

•	Avoid ingesting fake blood or applying it near the eyes, mouth, or open wounds.

•	Participation in blood-related effects is voluntary.

4\. Photos & Videos

•	By attending, you acknowledge that photos and videos will be taken and may be published across Black Room’s social media, websites, and promotional materials.

•	If you do not wish to appear in any recorded media, you must notify a member of our camera team at the event. They will make reasonable efforts to respect your request.

5\. Acceptance of Risk

•	Attendance is at your own risk. By entering the event, you release Black Room and its affiliates from liability related to exposure to fake blood, staining of personal property, allergic reactions, or any discomfort caused by event effects.o remain in a designated “no splash” zone.  **🚨NO RACISM, SEXCISM, HOMOPHOBIA, TRANSPHOBIA OR HATE OF ANY KIND.🚨**
```

**⚠️ DUE TO THE NATURE OF THE EVENT WE DO NOT OFFER REFUNDS.**

Miami’s underground awakens for our most ambitious event yet — **four stages, one marathon**, and the pulse of over a year’s evolution in the U.S. techno scene.

What awaits:\
⚫ 4 fully immersive stages\

This time, we welcome Veseli, one of Ireland’s most electrifying hard techno talents, known for blending acid, psytrance, hardstyle and raw hard techno, with releases on top underground labels and support from key figures in the global underground scene.

events.description:
HIGH VOLTAGE ⚡️

On January 16, Black Room unleashes **HIGH VOLTAGE** - a rave built to push every limit, where pounding kicks, strobe-lit chaos, and a sound system engineered for euphoria take control of the dancefloor.

For the first time, we join forces with **Quantum Nexus ⚛️** - a collective redefining connection through music and space. Together, we’re transforming Black Room into a full cyberpunk world: neon atmospheres, futuristic visuals, and relentless high-voltage techno delivered by standout local talent and seasoned selectors, guiding you through adrenaline, movement, and late-night intensity.

⚡️HIGH VOLTAGE

*DR*REIN

MADISON KAY

events.title: VARIANCE
events.description:
### THE LAST NIGHT OF JANUARY IS OURS.🔥🖤

The final night of the month comes in full force. We’re closing January by listening to our community and bringing back what you asked for: your Hard Techno room, Black Room.

And it doesn’t stop there - the night rises even further.

Zamurai returns from Argentina with the sound that already left its mark on our floor, and Casser joins in from NYC, bringing the raw, percussive energy of his Melted collective - both locking into the spirit of Black Room for a night built to be felt, not watched.

Alongside these returns, our local talent will carry the night:

events.title: ZAPEROCO
events.description:
**ZAPEROCO @ M2 MIAMI \[Back Room\]**\
**June 13th | 10:00PM-5:00AM**

''A beautiful kind of chaos. Lively, unexpected, and full of rhythm. A word rooted in Latin culture, often used to describe a vibrant mix of energy, movement, and celebration''

On June 6th, we bring that spirit to the Back Room at M2 Miami for a night honoring the Latin roots of Miami. Expect Latin influences woven throughout the music, atmosphere, and energy of the night. A tribute to the sounds, culture, and rhythm that help shape the city.

As the night unfolds, the pulse gets deeper, the room gets warmer, and the rhythm begins to pull you in! Expect full throttle from the beginning with a lil hypnotic twist guiding us until the end.

**Limited tickets available — prices will increase as the date gets closer.**

**🗓️ June 6th, 2026**

**📍 M2 Miami \[Back Room\]**

**⚠️ Physical ID required** | +21
